creator: corys@ixsystems.com
text:
I have not seen the patches related to adding 6235 (or improved HT40 stuff? Didn't look super close at that - the commitlog for the driver doesn't mention those changes) in releng/10.3 - it would be very useful to have that in 10.3 instead of waiting for 11!

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/releng/10.3/sys/dev/iwn/if_iwn.c?view=markup
and https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/sys/dev/iwn/if_iwn.c?view=markup&pathrev=281383
